description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a robust, tactical appearance, featuring a short barrel and a compact, ergonomic design. The main body is constructed from dark metal, with a ribbed fore-end grip and a pistol-style stock finished in a deep maroon color. The receiver area displays some text and a yellow accent, adding a touch of visual detail to the otherwise utilitarian look. The barrel is cylindrical and smooth, with a prominent muzzle opening and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. Overall, the shotgun is designed for close-quarters use, with a sturdy build and practical features suited for urban environments.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a dark metal body, ribbed fore-end, and maroon pistol grip stock. Features a short barrel, yellow accent, and robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pump-action fore-end, receiver details, yellow accent, and maroon pistol grip stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the linear alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump grip and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no ribbing or venting visible on the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
